jobs.title: Commercial Director – ICT, ELV Solutions
jobs.description: We are looking for a commercially driven leader who combines strong business development capability with technical understanding. The successful candidate should be confident engaging CEOs, developers, consultants and contractors, while also being able to challenge engineering teams on solution design, pricing and commercial viability.
responsibilities: Develop and execute the company’s commercial and business development strategy.
Identify, pursue and secure high-value ICT and ELV projects across multiple sectors.
Build and maintain executive-level relationships with developers, consultants, contractors, hotel groups, healthcare institutions, corporates and key stakeholders.
Lead negotiations for major contracts and commercial agreements.
Review, challenge and approve technical and commercial proposals before submission.
Work closely with engineering, design and project teams to develop winning solutions for clients.
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, ICT, Telecommunications, Business, Quantity Surveying or a related field.
MBA or relevant postgraduate qualification is highly desirable.
Minimum10 years’ experiencein business development, commercial management or strategic sales, with at least5 years in a senior leadership role.
Proven experience selling integrated ICT, ELV, Security, Audio Visual, Networking or Building Technologies solutions.
Demonstrated success in securing and managing large commercial projects.
jobs.howToApply: Interested candidates should submit their CV detailing relevant commercial leadership experience and notable projects delivered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

jobs.title: Cable & Antenna Systems Specialist Job Amentum
responsibilities: Perform maintenance, inspection, repair, and installation of antenna systems and associated hardware to ensure efficient and effective operation.
Conduct scheduled and unscheduled maintenance on various types of antennas, including high frequency (HF) and very high-frequency (VHF) systems.
Work aloft on antenna structures, ensuring compliance with all safety standards and protocols during performance of assigned tasks.
Utilize erection equipment and tools to assemble, install, and repair antenna systems and outside plant equipment.
Perform troubleshooting and repairs of damaged or non-functional components, including cables, reflectors, waveguides, and other antenna-related equipment.
Follow standard safety procedures and incorporate best practices for handling Radio Frequency (RF) systems and associated hazards.
requirements: At least three (3) years of experience maintaining and working on antennas and associated antenna components.
High school diploma or equivalent.
Proven experience or aptitude to operate erection equipment and utilize tools associated with antenna systems, with the potential to achieve journeyman-level expertise through on-the-job training.
Working knowledge and technical experience with outside plant equipment, antenna systems, and standard safety procedures.
Must be in possession of a valid passport and be able to travel internationally.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Technical Writer, Acquiring APIs Job Network International
jobs.description: As a leading fintech company, we are looking to enhance our digital enablement and as part of that we are creating a new team with the organization to manage our documentation.
responsibilities: Drive Utilization: Simplify complex technical concepts for external developer audiences, including API references, developer guides, and integration workflows and tracking the utilization and performance and using this data to share with stakeholders and imbed and track improvements continuously.

Product Lifecycle: Participate in product development cycles to making sure documentation aligns with product functionality and updates ensuring a high quality and accuracy throughout our documentation

Technical Integration Support: Provide direct or indirect (through documentation and workflows) support and guidance around our API’s and technical solutions to colleagues, developers, partners & merchants, helping them maximize the value of our products and services through best practices and emerging trends.
Documentation Development:  Create and maintain technical documentation, including API references, user manuals, developer guides, integration guides, FAQs, and troubleshooting materials.

Content Management:  Maintain version control for documentation and ensure accuracy during updates or system changes whilst organizing and structuring the content for intuitive navigation and readability by looking at and implemented best practices in the industry.

Process Optimization: Create and drive efficiencies by, developing standardize templates, processes, and best practices for technical documentation and continuously improving through reviews and intervention to improve usability and efficiency.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, or a related field.
3+ years of experience as a technical writer, preferably in the digital payment’s domain
Proven ability to write clear and concise documentation for technical and non-technical audiences.
Familiarity with digital payment systems, eCommerce platforms, APIs, and web technologies.
Proficiency in tools like Markdown, Confluence, Git, and other content management systems.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: ICT Business Systems Analyst- Mombasa Job Siginon Group
jobs.description: Reporting to the ICT Business Systems Manager, the job holder will be responsible for performing ICT Systems analysis of business and user needs, documentation of the requirements, and translation into proper systems requirements & specifications. Coordinate the implementation of any identified and approved process improvements, enhancements and controls in the existing ICT systems or new Systems
responsibilities: Trains, leads, and provides technical guidance to user departments and technical staff assigned to business systems analysis; directs the work of peers and/or subordinate professional Information Technology staff on assigned projects.

Analyses and evaluates business requirements, consults with personnel from various departments and identifies areas for the development of technical solutions to automate and/or improve business processes.

Provides recommendations on new or enhanced systems, software, upgrades, and modifications. Evaluates and balances the requirements/needs of multiple departments/divisions in identifying the technical solution that will best meet the identified needs. Participates in developing strategic plans for systems/applications development for the business units.

Acts as the project lead over moderate/large business automation projects; develops and monitors project budgets and resources; interfaces with clients to define project scope and review project activities, recommendations, and outcomes; coordinates the use of project resources based on project requirements; designs and implements project testing and quality assurance processes.

Assigning and directing project team members that cross multiple IT disciplines and/or departments; as well as other resources, on assigned Systems projects to ensure compliance with schedule, budget, and project specifications.
Coordinating the activities of contract personnel and/or vendors, consistent with project plans; identifying and resolving obstacles to progress
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology.
Relevant professional qualifications/certifications (SAP, SAP BYD, CBAP, Data analytics, PMI certification).
Minimum of 5 years’ experience in a similar role
Excellent Knowledge in System development life cycle
Proficiency in ERP systems, preferably SAP.
jobs.howToApply: If you believe your experience, competencies and qualifications match the job and role specifications described, send your application and detailed CV indicating your current and expected salary togrouphr@siginon.com

jobs.title: Sacco ICT & Compliance Manager Recruitment Job Co-operative Bank
responsibilities: Lead and manage the SACCO’s ICT infrastructure, systems, networks, and digital platforms to ensure secure, reliable, and efficient operations.
Develop, implement, and review ICT policies, procedures, controls, and security frameworks.
Oversee ICT governance, risk management, cybersecurity, and business continuity/disaster recovery initiatives.
Coordinate ICT audits, compliance reviews, risk assessments, and timely implementation of corrective actions.
Manage ICT vendors, service providers, consultants, and regulatory relationships.
Provide ICT support services, systems maintenance, and user support to enhance service delivery.
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information Systems, Cybersecurity or related field.
At least 5 years’ experience in ICT within a regulated financial institution, with 2 years in a supervisory role.
Professional certification in CISA, CISM, CRISC, ISO 27001, CCNA or equivalent.
Demonstrable knowledge of SASRA regulations, Data Protection Act, cybersecurity, ICT risk management, and business continuity management.
Strong leadership, analytical, strategic planning, and financial management skills.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Systems Administrator Job Cascade
jobs.description: We are looking for a hands-on Systems Administrator to manage, maintain, and secure our restaurant’s IT infrastructure. You will ensure maximum uptime for our front-of-house ordering systems, providing immediate technical support to keep operations running seamlessly.
responsibilities: Configure, update, and troubleshoot the restaurant’s Point of Sale (POS) terminals.
Oversee the administration, maintenance, and user permissions of our central operating system, ensuring smooth integration across various modules (including Accounts, Procurement, Inventory, and HR).
Maintain secure and stable network connections across front-of-house (guest Wi-Fi) and back-of house networks; manage firewalls, routers, and switch configurations.
Monitor daily system data backups and manage employee user accounts, access privileges, and system passwords to prevent unauthorized access.
Install and troubleshoot physical hardware (receipt printers, CCTV cameras, back-office computers) and provide rapid support for technical emergencies.
requirements: Degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
2-3 years of experience in IT systems administration, with a strong preference for candidates from the FMCG, hospitality, or retail sectors.
Vast knowledge in networking protocols and network hardware.
jobs.howToApply: If you are up to the challenge and possess the necessary qualification and experience, kindly send your CV and other academic certificates only quoting the job title on the email subject (Systems Admin) tohr.kitchens@cascade.ac.keon or before29thJune 2026.

jobs.title: Senior QA Automation Engineer Job Watu Credit
responsibilities: Designing, developing, and maintaining scalable automated test frameworks using Playwright and related tools.
Leading test automation strategy and ensuring alignment with overall QA and development goals.
Conducting comprehensive functional, regression, and integration testing across application modules.
Ensuring UI consistency and usability by validating visual design, accessibility, and user experience standards.
Analyzing backend processes, validating SQL data integrity, and troubleshooting data-related issues.
Managing and optimizing testing environments using Docker Compose and CI/CD pipelines.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in automated testing with TypeScript/JavaScript.
Expert-level proficiency in SQL, ability to design and optimize complex queries and data validation scripts.
Extensive experience with Playwright, including building scalable and maintainable test frameworks from scratch.
Strong understanding and application of OOP principles in test automation architecture.
Proficient with Git and branching strategies for collaborative test development.
